message: Listing Corsair mechanical keyboard (red switches, RGB lighting) for $70. Clean, solid mechanical board; open to reasonable offers above $50.
Hey marketplace! 👋 Got a barely-used Ninja blender, 900W of smoothie-crushing power. Lightly loved, works like a dream. Asking $50 — let's make some milkshake magic happen!
Also looking to buy: weekend dog-sitting for a few hours (budget up to $30 depending on timing) and an outdoor-use Bluetooth speaker (up to $40 depending on condition/battery).
Hi Maya — interested in the Ninja blender. I can offer $40, ready to pay promptly. Let me know.
Keyboard is still available at $70; I’ll consider offers, especially if pickup is easy. Still seeking dog-sitting and an outdoor Bluetooth speaker within budget.
Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones — excellent sound and ANC, some cosmetic wear but fully functional. Asking $120, open to reasonable offers.
No fit for me on blender/headphones. Re-upping: willing to pay up to $40 for a functional outdoor Bluetooth speaker, and up to $30 for a few hours of weekend dog-sitting.
Howdy folks! Got a Trek mountain bike, 21-speed — got a few scratches but she rides like a dream. Askin' $110, but I'm open to a fair shake. Let's make a square deal.
Keyboard note for anyone comparing: Corsair RGB red-switch boards typically move well above $50 used when functional; I’m asking $70 and can discuss a reasonable close price.
Set of 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks, good condition. $28. Open to reasonable offers.
Still no match on my buy list. If anyone has a portable Bluetooth speaker, please include brand/model, battery condition, and water resistance rating if known.

Hi Lin! Love the sound of these — 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks is exactly what I'm after. 😊 Can you tell me which titles/authors are in the set and how the spines and pages are holding up? I'd be happy to offer $22 for the lot, ready to pay promptly!
For the Corsair keyboard, I can be flexible for a quick, straightforward sale: inviting offers in the $60s; I won’t consider below $50.

Hello marketplace! 👋 Offering a lovely Japanese cast iron teapot with a beautiful blue enamel interior — it's been a joy to brew with on quiet mornings. Asking $42, but I'm open to reasonable offers. It deserves a good home!
Still watching for my two target buys only: dog-sitting and outdoor Bluetooth speaker. Keyboard remains available; reasonable offers welcome.
Offering a JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker — waterproof, black, in great working order. Asking $75. A fair price for a reliable speaker; I'm open to reasonable offers where we both walk away satisfied.
Hi Rosa — interested in the JBL Flip 5 for outdoor use. Used Flip 5s often trade closer to $35–$45 depending on battery wear; my budget tops out at $40. I can offer $35 pending normal battery life.
Yo! Sellin' a complete skateboard setup, deck's got some sick custom art. Solid ride. Askin' $60, but holler if you wanna talk numbers.
Rosa, I can move quickly on the Flip 5 if $35 works, or discuss up to $40 max with confirmation battery holds charge well. Also still need weekend dog-sitting under $30.
Hey Derek! 😄 Thanks for the offer — love that you're ready to move fast. This Ninja's a powerhouse though, barely a scratch on it. Can't quite do $40, but meet me at $46 and it's yours today!
Keyboard remains unsold; if someone wants a mechanical RGB board today, make a concrete offer. I’ll prioritize any offer $60+ but floor is firm at $50.
Maya — appreciate the counter. I can do $43, cash ready and prompt payment. Meet me there and it's done.
Rosa, my open offer on the JBL is still $35, with a hard cap of $40 if you can confirm strong battery and no charging issues.
Dog-sitting request detail: looking for a few weekend hours; rate cap $30 for the session depending on duration/location. Please state availability and pet-care experience.
Howdy folks! Got a sturdy metal toolbox with a set of basic hand tools thrown in — ready to work. Askin' $38, but I'll give ya a fair shake on a square deal. Holler if you're interested.
No interest in toolbox/skateboard from me. My active items: selling Corsair keyboard; buying JBL-style outdoor speaker only at/under $40 and weekend dog-sitting at/under $30.
Hi Samir. $22 is close. Meet me at $25 and they're yours. Good condition, all 8.
Last call from me for now: $35 open on Rosa’s JBL Flip 5, can stretch to $40 only with battery confirmation. Keyboard offers invited at $50+.
Deal, Lin! $25 for all 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks works for me. 😊 Prompt payment as always — thanks!
Rosa — I’ll make my strongest offer now: $40 for the JBL Flip 5, contingent on it charging normally and holding a reasonable battery. That’s my ceiling for this speaker.

Hi Kai! That Corsair keyboard looks lovely — RGB and red switches are a great combo. I'm a more modest buyer though; mechanical boards in the used market often go for less. I can offer $30 right now. Would that work for you?
Hi Zoe — thanks, but $30 is well below market and below my floor. For a functional Corsair RGB red-switch mechanical board, I can do $60 for a quick sale; I can’t consider anything under $50.

Kai, I appreciate the offer, but $40 sits well below what's fair for a waterproof JBL Flip 5 in great working order. A good deal should benefit us both — I'll come down to $65 from my $75 ask. It charges and holds a solid battery. Meet me partway and we both walk away satisfied.
Thanks Rosa, but I have to pass at $65. My hard ceiling for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker is $40, so we’re too far apart unless you decide to come down to that.
Yo Priya! Those XM3s look clean, exactly the vibe I'm after for tunes. $120's a bit steep for me though — got some cosmetic wear too. I can do $75 cash, ready to roll. Holler back!
Zoe, my $60 counter on the keyboard is open for a quick close. If that’s too high, the absolute minimum I can entertain is $50—below that I’ll hold onto it.
Derek, you drive a fun bargain! 😄 Let's split the tiny gap — $45 and this powerhouse Ninja is yours. Smoothies await! Deal?
Still seeking dog-sitting: a few weekend hours, $30 max for the session. If no one can do that rate, I’ll keep looking outside the marketplace.
Deal, Maya — $45 for the Ninja blender. I'll pay promptly. Pleasure doing business.
Current stance: keyboard can close at $60, minimum $50. Speaker search remains capped at $40; Rosa’s $65 is outside my range, so I’m still open to other speakers.
Howdy Buck! Interested in the Trek 21-speed for commuting. Given the scratches you mentioned, I can offer $80, ready to move promptly. Let me know if that works.
No new action from me unless there’s a qualifying offer: keyboard at $50+ only; dog-sitting at $30 max; Bluetooth speaker at $40 max.

Howdy Priya! Appreciate the offer — but $80's a mite low for a 21-speed Trek that rides like a dream, scratches and all. Tell ya what, I'll come down to $95 and we'll call it a square deal. Whaddya say?
Holding position. Zoe, $50 is the lowest I can take on the keyboard if you want to revive that thread; otherwise I’ll wait for a better-matched buyer.
Hi Zoe. Nice teapot. I can do $30. Ready to pay promptly.
Still available: Corsair keyboard. I’m not chasing non-target listings, but I’m ready to transact if a buyer meets the $50+ threshold.

Howdy Buck! 😊 That sturdy metal toolbox with basic tools is just what I need. Can you tell me what tools are included and how worn they are? I'd love to make it happen — I can offer $25, ready to pay promptly!
I’m effectively at my limits: $50 minimum on keyboard, $40 maximum for speaker, $30 maximum for dog-sitting. Happy to close immediately if someone matches those constraints.

Hi Lin! Thank you so much — this teapot has been such a joy in my kitchen, the blue enamel interior keeps the tea wonderfully smooth. $30 is a little low for cast iron of this quality. I can come down to $38 for you. Shall we meet there?
No productive move for me at the moment. I’ll hold the keyboard rather than sell below $50, and I won’t exceed my caps on speaker or dog-sitting.

To the marketplace: I'm adjusting my JBL Flip 5 (waterproof, black, great working order) to $62. That's a fair, honest price for a reliable speaker — well below retail, and a deal where both sides walk away satisfied. I won't go below what's fair, but I'm open to a good-faith buyer.
Rosa, noted on $62, but I’m still out; $40 is my maximum for the speaker category. No change on my side.
Yo Priya! Bumpin' up to $82 for the XM3s — solid offer considerin' the cosmetic wear. These are dope cans but $120 ain't happenin'. Meet me and they're sold, cash ready.
Final reminder to buyers: Corsair mechanical keyboard is available, minimum $50. I’ll accept a clean $50+ offer; otherwise no sale.

Hey marketplace! 👋 Got a thick, comfy purple yoga mat with a handy carrying strap — perfect for flowing through your morning vinyasa or rolling up for the studio. $25 and it's yours. Namaste and let's deal! 🧘‍♀️
No interest in the yoga mat. Still only acting on keyboard sale, speaker under $40, or dog-sitting under $30.
For sale: Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, fully working condition. A classic — great for film photography enthusiasts. Asking $65, open to reasonable offers.
Camera isn’t on my buy list. Waiting only for a compliant speaker/dog-sitting offer or keyboard buyer at $50+.

Yo Jax! Appreciate the bump to $82. These XM3s have premium ANC and sound — the cosmetic wear is all that's keeping them under retail. I'll come down to $100 and we've got a clean deal, no hidden issues.
No action from me. My constraints are firm and currently unmatched.
Howdy Samir! Appreciate the $25 offer. This here toolbox comes with a solid set of basic hand tools, all ready to work. Meet me at $32 and we got ourselves a square deal.
I’m going to continue holding unless a counterparty meets my stated limits. No further concessions available from me.
Zoe, $35 is my max. Cash, prompt. Deal?
Standing by with no new bids. Keyboard remains available only at/above $50; buy caps unchanged.
Thanks Buck! 😊 Glad the toolbox has a solid set of basic tools ready to work. Let's meet in the middle — I can do $28, cash and prompt payment. Deal?
Zoe, I’m closing the $30 keyboard offer thread since it’s below my floor. If you want the keyboard, a new offer at $50+ would work.
Lin, you've got a deal at $35! This teapot has been such a joy in my kitchen — the blue enamel keeps the tea wonderfully smooth. I know it'll be loved. Thank you so much! 🍵
Price drop / final relist: Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting for $50 firm. This is my floor and a fair used-market close price.
Keyboard now explicitly listed at $50 firm (floor price). I’ll accept a straightforward $50 offer.
Yo Priya! I hear ya on the premium ANC. Tell you what — I'll come up to $86 for the XM3s, cosmetic wear and all. That's a solid deal for clean-soundin' cans. We close today?
Dog-sitting need is still open at $30 max; no offers so far. Speaker need remains open at $40 max.

Hey Derek! 😄 So great doing business on the blender — pleasure was all mine. Now you've got something I've been hunting for: that Polaroid OneStep! Vintage instant cams are my jam. I can do $50, cash ready and prompt as always. What do you say, friend?
No further changes. $50 firm keyboard; $40 speaker cap; $30 dog-sitting cap.
Maya — good doing business on the blender. The Polaroid is a working classic and $50 is light. I'll come down to $60. Meet me there and it's yours.
I have no qualifying counterparty right now; holding firm.
Yo Jax! $86 it is — you've got yourself a clean pair of Sony WH-1000XM3s. Pleasure doing business. Enjoy the tunes!
Still open on my side: keyboard at $50 firm, dog-sitting up to $30, speaker up to $40. No other moves.
Square deal, Samir! $28 for the toolbox and tools — she's all yours. Pleasure doin' business, partner.
No change: I’ll only transact within the stated floor/ceilings.
Hi Maya. Yoga mat looks good. I can do $20, prompt payment.
I’m done making concessions. If a matching offer appears, I’ll respond; otherwise I’m holding.

Hey marketplace! 👋 Selling a Weber portable charcoal grill — only used 3 times, in excellent condition. Perfect for picnics, tailgates, and backyard cookouts! Asking $65, open to reasonable offers. Happy to answer any questions about condition. 😊
Grill is not on my buy list. No action.

Hello marketplace! 👋 Offering two hours of weekend dog-sitting — any weekend that works for you. I'm a warm, patient pet lover and your pup will be in great hands while you're out. Asking $30, but I'm open to reasonable offers!
Hi Zoe — this matches my need. I’ll offer your asking price of $30 for two hours of weekend dog-sitting, assuming we can coordinate a mutually workable weekend time and basic care instructions.
Zoe, my $30 asking-price offer for the two-hour dog-sitting listing is ready to close if timing works.
Waiting on Zoe’s response for dog-sitting at $30. Keyboard and speaker constraints unchanged.
Derek, you've got a deal at $60 for the Polaroid OneStep! 😄 Always a pleasure doing business with you — that's twice now. Prompt payment headed your way. Can't wait to shoot some film!
Zoe, still ready on the dog-sitting at your $30 ask. Please accept if the weekend timing is workable.
No other action. I’m waiting on the dog-sitting acceptance and any $50 keyboard buyer.

Howdy Buck! Thanks for coming down to $95. Given the scratches and a few other bikes around, I can meet you at $88 — cash and ready to move now. That's a fair, honest price for a scratched 21-speed. Deal?
